title: neumannia altensteinii
intro: Neumannia altensteinii, also known as the 'Altensteinia', is a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neumannia altensteinii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Neumannia altensteinii are typically made from its leaves, roots, or flowers, which can be used in teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
